features.name: Wall Walking
features.description: Move on walls and ceilings at normal speed, defying gravity

features.name: Burrowing
features.description: Move through earth/sand/rock at half speed, create temporary tunnels

features.name: Flight
features.description: Move in any direction at full speed with perfect maneuverability

features.name: Phasing
features.description: Selectively phase through solid barriers at normal speed

features.name: Short-Range Teleportation
features.description: Instantly teleport to visible location within movement range

features.name: Portal Creation
features.description: Create two linked portals as part of movement action
